Klasse BankTree.BankObject

java.lang.Object
de.btu.kt.syx.devices.BankTree.BankObject
Alle implementierten Schnittstellen:
Serializable
Umschließende Klasse:
BankTree<T extends BankTree.IBankObject>
public class BankTree.BankObject extends Object implements Serializable
Represents or contains a single bank object, e.g., a patch or a multi, in a bank.
Autor:
Matthias Wolff
Siehe auch:
  • Serialisierte Form

  • Methodenübersicht

    Modifizierer und Typ
    Methode
    Beschreibung
    String
    getName()
    Returns the name of this node.
    T
    getObject()
    Returns the bank object stored in this node.
    BankTree<T>.Bank
    getParent()
    Returns the parent of this node.
    BankTree<T>
    getRoot()
    Returns the root node of the bank tree containing this node.
    String
    getUID()
    Returns the unique identifier of this node in its parent node.
    String
    prettyPrint()
    Pretty-prints this node into a string.

    Von Klasse geerbte Methoden java.lang.Object

    equals, getClass, hashCode, notify, notifyAll, toString, wait, wait, wait

  • Methodendetails

    • getRoot

      public BankTree<T> getRoot()
      Returns the root node of the bank tree containing this node.

    • getParent

      public BankTree<T>.Bank getParent()
      Returns the parent of this node.

    • getUID

      public String getUID()
      Returns the unique identifier of this node in its parent node.

    • getName

      public String getName()
      Returns the name of this node. If a bank object is stored in this node, the method returns object.getName(), otherwise it returns name.

    • getObject

      public T getObject()
      Returns the bank object stored in this node.
      Gibt zurück:
      object, may be null

    • prettyPrint

      public String prettyPrint()
      Pretty-prints this node into a string.
      Gibt zurück:
      The string
